history.content: Quick startup snapshot: task and schedule systems are currently unavailable in this context, so there are no live task/schedule statuses to verify right now. Today’s notes highlight two key operational lessons: combine `schedule_job` + `task_control` telemetry for weekly reviews, and explicitly flag status mismatches (running vs paused) when signals conflict. Last known state: yesterday’s (2026-03-31) intraday notes were absent, memory sync correctly no-op’d, and we should continue graceful handling for intermittent/no-file days.
